## Type
- [ ] feat  - [ ] fix  - [ ] docs  - [ ] refactor  - [ ] chore  - [ ] security

## Checklist
- [ ] Respects hard boundaries: read-only, no new system of record, in-tenant.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real customer/margin data included.
- [ ] Docs/ADR updated if structure or a significant decision changed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for user-visible changes.
- [ ] CI is green; CODEOWNERS review requested.
